title: Why FactSet Research (FDS) is a Top Growth Stock for the Long-Term
text: The Zacks Style Scores offers investors a way to easily find top-rated stocks based on their investing style. Here's why you should take advantage.

title: 3 Stocks to Watch From the Business Information Industry
text: The pandemic-induced demand spike for solutions that ensure risk mitigation, cost reduction and productivity improvement should help the Zacks Business - Information Services industry prosper. FDS, SPGI and VRSK stocks are well poised to benefit from this demand surge.

title: Reasons to Retain FactSet (FDS) Stock in Your Portfolio Now
text: The recent acquisition of CUSIP Global Services is expected to significantly boost FactSet's (FDS) open data strategy and expand its position in global capital markets.
